title: pavonia steudneri
intro: Pavonia steudneri, also known as the rock rose or rose mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia steudneri include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, ointments, and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote skin health.
